current: on the 1st or on Sunday at midnight
proposed: at midnight whenever the day is the 1st or a Sunday

current: on the 1st or on Monday through Friday at midnight
proposed: at midnight whenever the day is the 1st or a weekday

current: on the 1st or on the last Friday of the month at midnight
proposed: at midnight whenever the day is the 1st or the last Friday of the month

current: every other day of the month or on Tuesday, Thursday, Saturday, and Sunday at midnight
proposed: at midnight whenever the day is an odd-numbered day, a Sunday, a Tuesday, a Thursday, or a Saturday

current: on the 1st through 15th or on Sunday at midnight
proposed: at midnight whenever the day is from the 1st through the 15th or a Sunday

current: on the last day of the month or on the last Friday of the month at midnight
proposed: at midnight whenever the day is the month’s last day or its last Friday

current: on the last day of the month or on Sunday at midnight
proposed: at midnight whenever the day is the last day of the month or a Sunday

current: on January 1 or on Sunday in January at midnight
proposed: in January at midnight whenever the day is the 1st or a Sunday

current: on the 1st or on the last Friday of the month, in January through March at midnight
proposed: in January through March at midnight whenever the day is the 1st or the last Friday of the month

current: every five minutes on the 1st or on Friday
proposed: every five minutes whenever the day is the 1st or a Friday

current: every five minutes on June 1 or on Friday in June
proposed: in June every five minutes whenever the day is the 1st or a Friday

current: every hour from 9 a.m. until 6 p.m. on June 1 or on Friday in June
proposed: in June every hour from 9 a.m. until 6 p.m. whenever the day is the 1st or a Friday
